节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The inputConsumer module provides APIs for subscribing to and unsubscribing from global shortcut keys.

Modifier key set (including Ctrl, Shift, and Alt). A maximum of two modifier keys are supported. There is no requirement on the sequence of modifier keys. For example, in Ctrl+Shift+Esc, Ctrl and Shift are modifier keys.
Modified key, which can be any key except the modifier keys and Meta key. For details about the keys, see Keycode. For example, in Ctrl+Shift+Esc, Esc is called the final key.
Whether to report repeated key events. The value true means to report repeated key events, and the value false means the opposite. The default value is true.
Sets the key event consumption configuration.
Key event type. Setting the value to 1 indicates that the key is pressed, and setting the value to 2 indicates that the key is pressed and released.
The value true means to report repeated key events, and the value false means the opposite. The default value is true.
Obtains all system hotkeys. This API uses a promise to return the result.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<Array<HotkeyOptions>> } Promise used to return the list of all system shortcut keys.
节点.return_description: Promise used to return the list of all system shortcut keys.

节点.功能描述:
Subscribes to application shortcut key change events based on the specified options. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result.
2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'hotkeyChange' } type - Event type. This parameter has a fixed value of hotkeyChange.
@param { Callback<HotkeyOptions> } callback - Callback used to return the application shortcut key change event.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@throws { BusinessError } 4200002 - The hotkey has been used by the system.
@throws { BusinessError } 4200003 - The hotkey has been subscribed to by another.

parameters.说明: Event type. This parameter has a fixed value of hotkeyChange.
Callback used to return the application shortcut key change event.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
The hotkey has been used by the system.
The hotkey has been subscribed to by another.

节点.功能描述:
Unsubscribes from application shortcut key change events. If this parameter is left unspecified, listening will be disabled for all callbacks registered for the specified shortcut key options.
2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'hotkeyChange' } type - Event type. This parameter has a fixed value of hotkeyChange.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: Event type. This parameter has a fixed value of hotkeyChange.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述:
Subscribes to key press events. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result. If the current application is in the foreground focus window, a callback is triggered when the specified key is pressed.
2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'keyPressed' } type - Event type. This parameter has a fixed value of keyPressed.
@param { KeyPressedConfig } options - Sets the key event consumption configuration.
@param { Callback<KeyEvent> } callback - Callback used to return key press events.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: Event type. This parameter has a fixed value of keyPressed.
Sets the key event consumption configuration.
Callback used to return key press events.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述:
Unsubscribes from key press events. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result. If this parameter is not specified, listening will be disabled for all registered callbacks.
2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'keyPressed' } type - Event type. This parameter has a fixed value of keyPressed.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: Event type. This parameter has a fixed value of keyPressed.
